title: Corrective fix for B-3e855a6c: Review TUI observability feature for release readiness
description:
Blocked reason: src/agent_takt/tui/app.py TuiSchedulerReporter.bead_deferred() (lines 1099-1102): state.deferred_this_cycle is assigned before _post() is called. If this is the first reporter call in a cycle, _post() clears the just-assigned set via .clear(), silently dropping the deferred bead ID. Fix: reorder to call _post() first, then update _deferred_this_cycle and sync to state. Add a test covering the first-call-in-cycle edge case.

Remaining work: Fix the bead_deferred() ordering bug: move _post() call before the deferred_this_cycle state sync to prevent _post()'s cycle-start clear from erasing the just-written bead ID.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-3e855a6c.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
